equivalences.note: Graduate LLB (LP001), undergraduate LLB (LB002), and combined LLB all lead to the same LLB qualification. Stream determines entry point and total duration.

Final Level electives come in two types: (1) lectures-and-examination electives, (2) seminars-and-research-paper electives. Students must take at least one of type (2), or do an Independent Research Paper instead.
Undergraduate LLB students must satisfy numeracy requirement via test OR MAM1013F. Test may not be attempted a second time.
